location: Guaranteed drop from the Death Knight boss fought at the end of Fog Rift Catacombs, a minor dungeon in Gravesite Plain.
tactics: From Castle Front grace, head northwest through the fortified ground beneath Fog Rift Fort to the catacombs entrance in the northern rock face, west of the Church of the Crusade

This Death Knight fights with dual lightning axes instead of the halberd other Death Knights use — melee combos telegraph with a windup, but watch for a 6-orb lightning volley (roll late) and a lightning-charged spinning whirlwind (run sideways first, then roll into it as it closes)
Around 50% HP it gains a life-draining grab attack that heals it a large amount on contact — stand behind a pillar or roll at the last instant
Lightning resistance (Boltdrake Talisman, Lightningproof Dried Liver) meaningfully softens this fight
lore: These paired golden axes belonged to a Death Knight who personally guarded Godwyn and watched over the corpse kept as his ritual surrogate; they still crackle with the lightning power tied to the capital's dragon-worshipping cult.

builds.name: Str/Faith lightning quality
builds.why: D/D/D scaling across Strength, Dexterity and Faith spreads investment, and Faith also boosts the weapon's innate lightning damage plus the Blinkbolt skill's burst

builds.name: Mobility skill-user
builds.why: Blinkbolt: Twinaxe is a fast, i-framed lightning dash with a spinning follow-up — usable as a gap-closer or escape tool even without heavy stat investment
